title: rubus × pseudoandegavensis
intro: Rubus × pseudoandegavensis, also known as the pseudo-ande hybrid blackberry, is a hybrid species of blackberry native to the Andean region. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anthocyanins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudoandegavensis include its potential to help reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, tinctures, and jams, which are consumed for their medicinal and culinary properties.
